case_title: ALLISON BARTON RICE VS. GLENN YOUNGLING

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY RICE, ALLISON BARTON AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNGLING, GLENN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICE, ALLISON BARTON AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNGLING, GLENN
DECLARATION TO AMEND SC-100 ITEM 3. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICE, ALLISON BARTON
AMENDED CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICE, ALLISON BARTON AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNGLING, GLENN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICE, ALLISON BARTON AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNGLING, GLENN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-23-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNGLING, GLENN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JUL-29-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNGLING, GLENN
SC-105: REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER RECEIVED AND FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICE, ALLISON BARTON
SC-105 "ANSWER" FROM THE DEFENDANT GLEN YOUNGLING RECEIVED VIA MAIL AND FILED.

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER IS "DENIED". "THERE IS NO PRE TRIAL DICOVERY IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT. PLAINTIFF MAY SUBPOENA DOCUMENTS TO THE HEARING, IF HE SO CHOSES. ANY SUCH SUBPOENA WILL BE SUBJECT TO ANY APPLICABLE CLAIM OF PRIVILEGE", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-05-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHALLENGES COMMISSIONER SLAVIT PER CCP 170.6. PARTIES SHALL REPORT TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR ASSIGNMENT. (DEFENDANT WAIVES INVALID SERVICE IN OPEN COURT.) COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CERTIFIED MAIL RECEIPT RECEIVED AND FORWARDED TO #506 TO BE FILED IN CASE FILE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICE, ALLISON BARTON
SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2010 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT.
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2010 - SMALL CLAIMS ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIMS TRIAL COURT CALENDAR ON OCT-05-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 501, JUDGE RONALD QUIDACHAY. (206)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2010 BY RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S EXH.RETAINED. CLERK R. PASCUAL.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICE, ALLISON BARTON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YOUNGLING, GLENN THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF INCREDIBLE AND CAUSE OF ACTION I.E. PERJURED HIMSELF BY UNTRUTHFULLY STATING THAT DEFENDANT REPRESENT HIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICE, ALLISON BARTON
SC-108 "ANSWER" ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS) RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT GLENN H. YOUNGLING.
ADDENDUM TO SC-108 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON OCT-12-2010 FILED W/DECLARATION OF MAILING (AS PROOF OF SERVICE ON MAILING OF ADDENDUM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICE, ALLISON BARTON
ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT(SMALL CLAIMS)IS "DENIED" *(THIS EFFECTIVELY IS AN APPEAL WHICH PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT STANDS)*. PER JUDGE RONALD QUIDACHAY.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
